ChangeRequest.name: Typo in the preferred abbreviation of the the entity type Security borrowing and lending transaction including cash as collateral component
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli
### Description of change request
The preferred abbreviation should be **SCRTY**\_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_INCLDNG_CSH_CLLTRL instead of **SCTRY**\_BRRWNG_LNDNG_TRNSCTN_INCLDNG_CSH_CLLTRL
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
_Security borrowing and lending transaction including cash as collateral component_
### Forward Engineering considerations
_\[Other considerations\]_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
